---
title: "Table 1"
author: "Arnaud"
date: "2026-07-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

library(readr)
library(knitr)
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(broom)
library(scales)
library(dplyr)
```

# Load dataset

```{r}

dataset <- read_csv(
  here::here("output", "dataset_patients_combined.csv.gz"),
  col_types = cols(
    patient_id = col_integer(),
    age = col_double()
  )
)
dataset <- as.data.frame(dataset) %>%
  mutate(
     medication =(dataset$numerator_gp_medication_all_conditions + dataset$numerator_pf_medication_all_conditions)
  ) %>%
  select(
    patient_id,
    index_date,
    sex,
    age,
    imd,
    ethnicity,
    stp,
    region,
    dataset$numerator_pf_medication_uti,
    dataset$numerator_gp_medication_uti,
    dataset$numerator_pf_medication_insectbite,
    dataset$numerator_gp_medication_insectbite,
    dataset$numerator_pf_medication_otitismedia,
    dataset$numerator_gp_medication_otitismedia,
    dataset$numerator_pf_medication_impetigo,
    dataset$numerator_gp_medication_impetigo,
    dataset$numerator_pf_medication_shingles,
    dataset$numerator_gp_medication_shingles,
    dataset$numerator_pf_medication_sinusitis,
    dataset$numerator_gp_medication_sinusitis,
    dataset$numerator_pf_medication_sorethroat,
    dataset$numerator_gp_medication_sorethroat,
    dataset$numerator_pf_medication_all_conditions,
    dataset$numerator_gp_medication_all_conditions,
    has_medication
  )

head(dataset)
```

# Table by IMD

```{r}

table_imd <- dataset %>%
  group_by(imd) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n(),
    n_with_medication = sum(has_medication == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    percent_with_medication =
      round(100 * n_with_medication / n_patients, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(imd)

kable(table_imd)
```

# Patients over time by IMD
```{r}

table_imd_plot <- dataset %>%
  group_by(index_date, imd) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(imd != "Missing")

ggplot(table_imd_plot,aes(x = index_date,y = n_patients,colour = imd, group = imd)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_point(size = 1.8) +
  labs(
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of patients",
    colour = "IMD",
    title = "Figure 1: Number of patients receiving medication overtime by IMD"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 months",
    date_labels = "%Y-%m"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1
    ),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```
